title: Short title
doc_html:
PART VII. MONITORING OF NURSING HOME CARE

§1193.1. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Nursing Home Virtual Visitation Act".

            Acts 2018, No. 596, §1.

PART VII.  MONITORING OF NURSING HOME CARE
§1193.1.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Nursing Home Virtual Visitation
Act".
Acts 2018, No. 596, §1.
